scope: structural scaffold for paid deep-report expansion across all 31 personas

visible pattern.must explain: 日常で見える行動や反応

inner contradiction.must explain: 強みと引っかかりが同居する場所

relationship pattern.must explain: 家族・友人・場との関わり方

stress / collapse pattern.must explain: 負荷が高い時に起きる崩れ方

growth direction.must explain: 次に伸びるとしたらどこか

why this is not the neighboring persona.must explain: 隣の人格との決定的な差
why this is not the neighboring persona.must not drift into: 似ている点の列挙だけ

expansion hooks for future premium layer.must explain: 後続レイヤーで広げる余白

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: Long-form writing can turn one-to-one reply temperature and group / weekend reply rhythm into the same “communication style” story.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Keep one-to-one temperature versus group / scene timing as separate axes.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “この人は返事が早くて、相手にやさしくて、連絡もうまい”とひとまとめにする paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: Every report must name the context: LINE相手, 場, 週末, グループのどれで動くかを分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: All are low-energy recovery states; the report can easily flatten them into “疲れている / 休みたい” only.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Keep the time anchor and load anchor: solo quiet, night reserve, evening recovery, weekend downshift.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “この人は休むのが上手です”で終わる paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 必ず「いつ」「どの負荷で」回復するかを明記する。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: Change tolerance, decision latency, and action threshold all sound like “flexible / decisive” if expanded loosely.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Keep the threshold verb: 着地, 線引き, まず動く.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “変化に強く、決断も早いです”のように線引きを消す paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 「待つ」「決める」「動く」のどれが先かを明文化する。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: All involve load and switching. A deep report can easily reduce them to a generic “busy life” narrative.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Sequence / simultaneous load / load tuning must remain distinct.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “毎日忙しくても頑張る人です”で止まる paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 用事の種類と負荷の形を必ず分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: Shopping, tidying, and reward-reset all feel like “life reset” when expanded, which erases the real object being handled.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Basket / placement / reward-plus-cleanup must stay explicit.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “生活を整えると気分も上がる”だけの paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 何を整えるのかを先に書き、気分は後に置く。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: Safety check and repeated confirmation will collapse into a generic cautiousness story if not separated.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: Environment hazard check versus repeated safety confirmation.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “慎重で安全意識が高いです”で同じにする paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 危険そのものを見るのか、確認を重ねるのかを分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection.why: Both are spacing and social rhythm. A long report can erase the one-to-one vs group scale difference.
hotspot_boundary_protection.levers: One-to-one spacing versus room / group / community spacing.
hotspot_boundary_protection.bad_para: “人との距離感がうまいです”で完結する paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection.guardrail: 相手と場を同じ文で扱わず、スケールを固定して書く。

personas.teaser_handoff_reference: 朝の立ち上がりと出発前の整え方が、その日の滑り方を決める。
personas.share_card_handoff_reference: 早起き / 段取り / ひと声 / ゆっくり始動
personas.deep_report_function: 朝型・段取り型の深い意味を、日常の場面と負荷の構造から読み解く。
personas.deep_report_core_identity: 朝の最初の動きと出発準備を、順番よく整える
personas.deep_report_core_tension: 朝の起動と出発準備を同じ準備線に置き、後半の判断圧力から切り離す。
personas.deep_report_hidden_pattern: 朝型・段取り型の表に出にくい効き方を、行動・負荷・回復の順で示す。
personas.deep_report_relational_pattern: 朝型・段取り型が人や場に合わせる時の型を、具体的な日常文脈で示す。
personas.deep_report_strength_pattern: 朝型・段取り型の強みは、朝の起動と出発準備を同じ準備線に置き、後半の判断圧力から切り離す。 の形で出る。
personas.deep_report_self-sabotage_or_cost_patter: 強みが裏返ると、朝型・段取り型は境目を保ちすぎる / 負荷を抱えすぎる / 先に整えすぎる方向に寄る。
personas.deep_report_growth_direction: この人格は、朝型・段取り型の核を保ったまま、より小さな摩擦で動けると伸びる。
personas.deep_report_boundary_note: 朝型・段取り型は、隣の P02, P22 と見た目が近くても、D署名の中心が違う。
personas.deep_report_language_constraints: 日本語自然 / 具体場面 / 商用可 / 断定しすぎない / でも曖昧にしない
personas.deep_report_paid_value_note: Teaser/share-cardで見せた一文の根拠と、日常場面での具体的な読み筋を提供する。
personas.future_compatibility_hook_note: Later compatibility or premium layers can deepen this without changing the D signature.
personas.future_progression_hook_note: Further paid layers may add scenario branching, advice variants, or progression notes while keeping the same persona boundary.

global_deep_report_operating_rules: Keep the same canonical persona master and 21-dimension backbone.
Expand the same persona; do not re-invent it.
Commercial usefulness is required; vague self-help is not enough.
The report may be richer than teaser/share-card copy, but it must not become fluffy or therapeutic.
anti_patterns_for_long_form_persona_writ: 人格を良い悪いで裁く書き方
どの人格にも当てはまる一般論
隣の人格との差分を消す比較文
神話名だけで成立させる書き方

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: Long-form writing can turn one-to-one reply temperature and group / weekend reply rhythm into the same “communication style” story.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Keep one-to-one temperature versus group / scene timing as separate axes.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “この人は返事が早くて、相手にやさしくて、連絡もうまい”とひとまとめにする paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: Every report must name the context: LINE相手, 場, 週末, グループのどれで動くかを分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: All are low-energy recovery states; the report can easily flatten them into “疲れている / 休みたい” only.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Keep the time anchor and load anchor: solo quiet, night reserve, evening recovery, weekend downshift.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “この人は休むのが上手です”で終わる paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 必ず「いつ」「どの負荷で」回復するかを明記する。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: Change tolerance, decision latency, and action threshold all sound like “flexible / decisive” if expanded loosely.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Keep the threshold verb: 着地, 線引き, まず動く.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “変化に強く、決断も早いです”のように線引きを消す paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 「待つ」「決める」「動く」のどれが先かを明文化する。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: All involve load and switching. A deep report can easily reduce them to a generic “busy life” narrative.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Sequence / simultaneous load / load tuning must remain distinct.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “毎日忙しくても頑張る人です”で止まる paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 用事の種類と負荷の形を必ず分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: Shopping, tidying, and reward-reset all feel like “life reset” when expanded, which erases the real object being handled.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Basket / placement / reward-plus-cleanup must stay explicit.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “生活を整えると気分も上がる”だけの paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 何を整えるのかを先に書き、気分は後に置く。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: Safety check and repeated confirmation will collapse into a generic cautiousness story if not separated.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: Environment hazard check versus repeated safety confirmation.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “慎重で安全意識が高いです”で同じにする paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 危険そのものを見るのか、確認を重ねるのかを分ける。

hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.why: Both are spacing and social rhythm. A long report can erase the one-to-one vs group scale difference.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.levers: One-to-one spacing versus room / group / community spacing.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.bad_para: “人との距離感がうまいです”で完結する paragraph.
hotspot_boundary_protection_notes.guardrail: 相手と場を同じ文で扱わず、スケールを固定して書く。

handoff_rules_for_future_mythology_namin: Mythology names may decorate the persona later.
Names must not redefine the structural persona or dimension logic.
If a name blurs a boundary, the name must yield to the structural source of truth.
handoff_rules_for_future_compatibility_l: Any compatibility layer must reuse the same persona boundaries and D signatures.
Compatibility can add context, not identity change.
Do not let compatibility copy become a second persona system.
handoff_rules_for_future_recurring_progr: Recurring content must stay anchored to the same persona structure.
Progression layers may deepen scene detail or usage frequency, not the base boundary.
Returning-user content must not rewrite the canonical meaning of the persona.
